allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Revamp graphics with neo-retro monument tiles for all 5 cities

Expand tileset from 64 to 256 tiles with detailed pixel art for
recognizable landmarks: Eiffel Tower, Big Ben, Colosseum, Koutoubia
minaret, Tokyo Tower, and many more. Each city now has multiple
iconic monuments placed in the map, giving each a distinct cliché
identity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update docs to reflect asset refactoring and current codebase state

Fix outdated test counts \(168→295\), NPC counts \(15→40\), city dimensions
\(30x25→50x40\), add src/assets/ to file structure, update BootScene
description to thin orchestrator, add i18n and currentRoom references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Manga-style graphics overhaul: 32x32 tiles, cel-shaded aesthetic

- Add MangaSpriteProvider with manga cel-shading, bold outlines, and
  city-specific architectural details for all 26 tile types
- Upgrade from 16x16 to 32x32 tiles, 16x24 to 32x48 sprites, zoom 3→2
- Extract tile/sprite dimensions to src/constants.js \(TILE_W, TILE_H, etc.\)
- Add external PIPOYA sprite support with 3-frame→4-frame remapping and
  graceful procedural fallback when PNGs are unavailable
- Update collision bodies \(Player 20x20, NPC 24x24\), interaction distances,
  particle effects, and environmental animations for 32px world
- Move BootScene provider creation to init\(\) for safe scene lifecycle
- Clean up loader event listeners after sprite loading completes
- Add 41 regression tests covering tile math, collision consistency,
  interaction distances, room transition spawns, and source correctness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git merge manga-graphics -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Merge manga-graphics: 32x32 tile overhaul with cel-shaded aesthetic

Brings in MangaSpriteProvider, 32x32 tiles, 32x48 sprites, external
PIPOYA sprite support, and 41 regression tests. All 336 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for f in src/assets/sprites/lea.png src/assets/sprites/npc_librarian.png src/assets/sprites/npc_photographer.png src/assets/sprites/npc_professor.png)
Bash(do node -e "const buf = require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''$f''\); console.log\(''$f:'', buf.readUInt32BE\(16\) + ''x'' + buf.readUInt32BE\(20\)\);")
Bash(git -C /c/Users/harrisb/Documents/questGame add src/data/cities.js src/data/dialogues.js src/data/i18n/en.js src/data/i18n/fr.js src/data/quests.js)

Bash(git -C /c/Users/harrisb/Documents/questGame commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix oasis door deadlock and add breadcrumb dialogs for amulet→oasis transition

The oasis door required marrakech_met_nadia, but Nadia is inside the
oasis — making the game unwinnable. Change requiresFlag to
marrakech_has_amulet. Add post-amulet dialogs for Zahra, Youssef,
Tariq, and Fatima \(EN + FR\) to guide the player east to the oasis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
